Thanks for contributing! Please fill in as much as you know.

## Basic Info
- **School / Camp name:**
- **Country:**
- **City:**
- **Website:**

## Program Details
- **Camp type:** (summer / winter / both)
- **Age range:** (e.g. 2–6)
- **Duration options:** (e.g. 1 week, 2 weeks)
- **Languages:** (e.g. English, Japanese)
- **Curriculum type:** (e.g. Montessori, Play-based, Sports)

## Schedule
- **Start date:**
- **End date:**
- **Any notes on schedule:**

## Pricing
- **Price per week:** (e.g. 500 EUR / leave blank if unknown)

## Format
- **Half-day available?** (yes / no)
- **Full-day available?** (yes / no)

## Your notes
Any helpful tips for parents? (e.g. "fills up fast", "transport included", "accepts visiting children")

## Source
How did you find this camp? (personal experience / website / expat group)
